name: Trust Registry CA in Docker
description: Downloads the deployer CA certificate and installs it so Docker trusts the local registry mirror (registry-1.docker.io). Skipped if no local mirror is detected via DNS.

parameters.name: Deployer URL
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: deployer base URL for CA download

parameters.name: VE Context
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: VE context key for CA download
